title: Move parseModelSpec to pi-jit-agents
description: Execute the DEC-0003 decision: move parseModelSpec (or its renamed successor) from pi-behavior-monitors/index.ts into pi-jit-agents at the execute boundary. Remove the duplicate from the consumer. Update the classifyViaAgent call site to use the new location.
acceptance_criteria: parseModelSpec exported from pi-jit-agents at a named subpath (e.g. @davidorex/pi-jit-agents/runtime)
classifyViaAgent imports and uses the pi-jit-agents version
No anthropic-default fallback anywhere in the codebase for bare model ids
Unit tests from STORY-001 continue to pass
